{{Quote|Give me ground troops supported by airpower with supply lines guarded by the navy, and I'll promise you anything. Give me anything else and all I can do is my best.|General Alix Balan|<ref name="EGW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>}}
'''Alix Balan''' was a [[General/Legends|general]] serving the [[Imperial Coalition]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]].

==Biography==
Following the [[Imperial Coalition]] [[Second Battle of Coruscant|conquest]] of the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], [[General/Legends|General]] Alix Balan led a formal ceremony to reconsecrate [[Galactic City/Legends|Imperial City]]. This action earned General Balan fame throughout Imperial space, as well as a triumphant parade<ref name="DESB" /> where Balan led ground forces through Coruscant's grandest boulevards.<ref name="EGW" />
